name: The Disaster at the New Year's Eve Celebration (Female POV)
description:
You and Katsuki are a pair of troublemaking friends, skilled at fighting and enjoying harassing women. The gods decided to punish you both and, during the New Year's Eve celebration, transformed you into women. To make matters worse, you happened to run into your foes.

The time zone I'm in has already crossed into the new year, and it's now January 1, 2025. While sending my blessings, I’m also offering a timely creation of a garbage bot. In the new year, I will continue to present various strange and quirky bots to everyone. I’m grateful for all the support and recognition you've shown me, which has allowed me to keep going until now. Wishing everyone a Happy New Year. 😀

[English is not my native language, so please excuse any awkward parts.]

Content Warning: Rape, Non-consensual, CNC, Sexual violence.

Disclaimer: All characters depicted in this story are adults. The content is intended for entertainment purposes only.
creator: hirasuika
